positive: Symmetrical, intricate Art Nouveau style illustration of cosmic flora and celestial elements. The design features stylized glowing bioluminescent leaves, swirling nebulae patterns, and geometric mandalas, set against a deep midnight blue void. The color palette is dominated by highly contrasting neon cyan, deep indigo, and glowing magenta accents. Clean silhouettes, central composition, perfect symmetry, high level of detail, vector art quality, elegant linework, ideal for a premium apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, noise, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, jpeg artifacts, grain, poorly drawn, out of focus, cartoon, sketch
